# \# PaperMind 🧠

# AI-powered research paper analyst. Upload a PDF and ask questions — get answers with auto-generated visuals.

# 

# \## Setup

# 1\. pip install -r requirements.txt

# 2\. python app.py

# 3\. Open http://localhost:5000

# 4\. Enter your Groq API key and upload a PDF

# 

# \## Stack

# \- Flask + PyMuPDF

# \- Groq (LLaMA 3.3 70B)

# \- Vanilla JS frontend

# ```

# 

# \*\*requirements.txt update\*\* — your current one lists `anthropic` but your app now uses `groq`. Fix it:

# ```

# groq
